changelog: DIAGNOSTIC + DEFENSIVE BUILD (DEV ONLY): Added an ANR watchdog that detects main-thread freezes >4s, captures the main-thread stack trace + last 30 breadcrumbs, writes to anr.log, and uploads on next launch. This closes the diagnostic gap that ate v1.44.0 → v1.44.2 — ANRs are SIGKILL'd by the OS and bypass every JVM crash handler, which is why no crash data ever made it to the server.

Sports page: hardened the click-to-play path with try/catch around nav.navigate, added stream-URL validation (no playback attempted on streamId<=0 or blank URL), made pill clicks idempotent (clicking the already-selected pill is a no-op).

Breadcrumbs added throughout Sports interactions (page mount, data load, league change, card focus, card click, play attempts) so the next ANR / crash report shows exactly what the user did right before the freeze.
Mandatory:true so devices stuck on v1.44.0 → v1.44.2 force-update.
